title: Different Firework Rockets
description: Helps differentiate fireworks with different flight duration.
body:
## Will be updated to 1.20.5 once CIT is released for this version.

Changes the texture of firework rockets to help differentiate between their flight duration.

![New firework texture in order of flight duration.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S2S0vt9k/images/9b38a959b61a1afaeceaaa77b1f0deb6c858db88.png)

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) for Forge users or [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for Fabric users.
